scripts.build: pnpm --filter @framework/contracts build && pnpm --filter @framework/core build && pnpm --filter @framework/docs build && pnpm --filter @framework/node-adapters build && pnpm --filter @framework/ui-shared build && pnpm --filter @framework/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @framework/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @framework/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @framework/docs typecheck && pnpm --filter @framework/node-adapters typecheck && pnpm --filter @framework/ui-shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @framework/desktop typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @framework/contracts clean && pnpm --filter @framework/core clean && pnpm --filter @framework/docs clean && pnpm --filter @framework/node-adapters clean && pnpm --filter @framework/ui-shared clean && pnpm --filter @framework/desktop clean
